values.description: Active JWT token — auto-set by Login/Register scripts. Used by shared read endpoints.
Active refresh token — auto-set by Login/Register scripts.
JWT token for Admin role — auto-set by Login as Admin / Register as Admin.
Refresh token for Admin — auto-set by Login as Admin / Register as Admin.
JWT token for Teacher role — auto-set by Login as Teacher / Register as Teacher.
Refresh token for Teacher — auto-set by Login as Teacher / Register as Teacher.
JWT token for Student role — auto-set by Login as Student / Register as Student.
Refresh token for Student — auto-set by Login as Student / Register as Student.
